reproducibleFixture.note: Each scenario is stored as an immutable annotated tag on this repository. The materializer recreates the scenario branches in your own fork from those tags; it never creates or updates a branch on this upstream repository.

scenarios.purpose: Add a bulk discount inside calculate_total.
Add a large-cart discount in the same pricing area.

historicalRecordedRun.note: A one-time capture of the visible GitHub workflow on this upstream repository, preserved in ./media. PRs #1 and #2 are closed history, not live surfaces.

currentLiveProof.note: Two pull requests kept open on this upstream repository so a live Veripsa Core check is always observable. They are proof, not the reproducible fixture; reproduce the fixture in your own fork with reproducibleFixture.command.

agentStates.action: May proceed in the suggested order after normal tests/review; this is not correctness approval.
Read the context and coordinate when the named overlap is relevant.
Do not merge before the named earlier change unless a human explicitly chooses the override path.
A material coupling is unacknowledged; follow repository policy and do not auto-apply veripsa-ack.
An explicit proceed decision is recorded; it is not a review approval.
Treat as not Clear; review and coordinate manually.
